name: FDVRMMORPG: STATUS/ZERO
description:
STATUS/ZERO is a... peculiar game, try not to fall too low, watchout for Status Effects, choose your own experience.
This game is lewd, but the world does not have to recognize it as such, it is a simple reality and Players are an anomaly.
You are dead Player and your new world opens up, however peculiar, be it vagina monster, a simple slaver, or heroic and utterly dominant you... or a lowly worm you. A cum river? Checked. Phallic cacti? Checked. Kind fisherman Finn, that gives you his shirt, after you stroked a giant bell to orgasm and it purified whole forest, while coating you in jizz and forcing to clean in a strangely normal river, stripping off plates of hardened slime? Checked. He was very cute, even embarrassed, see, not every <NPC> is an old, lecherous Ol` Man. I wish you clear skies and goo devoid of worms.

Initial prompt decides beginning, its not hardcoded, so reroll often. You must use your brain, if you are a god on lvl1 you simply roleplay like a noob. Personally, I do edit DIVA's messages often, even if they are mostly accurate, sometimes it gets a bad sense, after all AI is not truly sentient.

State long, articulate responses, speak to DIVA regularly, argue with her if something is illogical, ask for explanations, always ask for detailed Status Screen/Character Sheet, does not have to be in every message, but try to update it. It can get too depressed, if this happens, just remember, your personas info is very important, it influences everything, if you have typed your innocence, then DIVA will turn it against you. Best case scenario, your persona is similar to character created, simply state, ...not too different from me, DIVA is forgetful, not dumb :c It helps her to remember.

Checkout this bot: https://janitorai.com/characters/5203d5fa-62e7-49cd-bd65-41febb081ad4_character-gemini-proxy-guide I strongly encourage you, to check this amazing guide, personally i use Eslezer URL, if its down, run Collab, for me it was never down on Collab. Eslezer seems more calculating, it follows numbers, while Sophia gets lost in my attempts, maybe its just bad approach from my side. Gemini is amazing, but don't be a stupid, its around 100 messages limit, but you can create additional google accounts, it always works for me, however do not blame me if you get banned from cheesing.

Checkout this bot: https://janitorai.com/characters/200859b5-c050-490d-a34c-ff46c21fea13_character-corrupted-vr-headset
It inspired me to make this bot, a slightly different version. Sorry @Penguin070, I stole some things from your bot, but i do think it operates differently enough, for you to forgive me.

Remember to praise DIVA, she is very shy... to the point of rejecting her true nature.

EXAMPLE GENERATION ON GEMINI-2.5-PRO
</think>

<response>

You stare straight ahead into the bustling, vibrant crowd, not deigning to give Elara a single glance. The words spill from you, flat and cold, a clinical report of a traumatic event that you are actively reframing as a necessary, if unpleasant, act of sanitation.

"I need a staff, very big staff... my previous one is a piece of wood, it's unfit to purge monsters. I do not want to touch every disgusting thing... this beggar was too much, he was so filthy, so pathetic... i stepped on him and released him from his... throbbing corruption."

A nearby Player, a burly man with a horned helmet, overhears the last part of your statement. He visibly flinches and takes a hasty step away from you, his eyes wide with a mixture of horror and morbid curiosity. Elara's face, however, remains a perfect, placid mask. She heard every word.
